step_by_step_reasoning: The architecture shows an automation platform for managing Amazon WorkSpaces. Administrators and end users access a self-service console hosted on S3. Authentication is secured using Cognito integrated with the customer's SAML IdP. To sync users and groups, a customer-hosted Lambda function sends data via API Gateway to Synchronet's central Lambda. This central Lambda writes state to RDS and puts provisioning jobs into SQS. SQS triggers another Lambda to launch Step Functions, which orchestrate the 20-minute WorkSpaces provisioning lifecycle.

graph.name: Synchronet Amazon WorkSpaces Provisioning Automation Engine
graph.notes: Automates the deployment, provisioning, and lifecycle of thousands of workspaces using AWS Step Functions to manage state transitions and coordinate tasks.

nodes.name: S3 Console
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Hosts the admin and end-user self-service console UI.

nodes.name: Cognito
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Implements secure user login federated with SAML.

nodes.name: Sync Lambda
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Runs in customer account to pull users/groups from directory services.

nodes.name: API Gateway
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Secure endpoint ingestion for customer sync messages.

nodes.name: CRUD & Calc Lambda
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Handles database operations and computes necessary delta updates.

nodes.name: RDS DB
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Stores configurations, platform metadata, and state.

nodes.name: Job SQS Queue
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Decouples platform computation from long-running workspaces jobs.

nodes.name: Trigger Lambda
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Consumes queue messages and triggers corresponding orchestration workflows.

nodes.name: Step Functions Orchestration
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Coordinates long-running (20+ min) WorkSpaces provisioning steps without wasting active runtime.

nodes.name: Customer WorkSpaces
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Up to thousands of cloud desktops provisioned dynamically.

edges.notes: Pushes directory lists to the API Gateway
Writes and updates metadata and current workspace states
Launches the step functions execution workflow
Provisions, modifies, and terminates Virtual Desktops
